name: Novita AI
pricing_notes: Pay-per-use; LLM tokens + image/video gen credits; competitive pricing vs AWS/GCP

performance.notes: LLM inference competitive; image gen 3-10s; async polling for image/video

agent_readiness.notes: Unified API for LLMs + Stable Diffusion image gen + video gen. OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint. Python SDK available. Cost-competitive for Stable Diffusion workflows.

gotchas: Mixed platform (LLM + image + video) means no single strength
Less established reliability vs specialized providers
best_when: Building multimodal pipelines needing both LLM and image gen from one API key
Cost-optimizing Stable Diffusion workflows vs Replicate/Stability
Prototyping applications that span text + image + video generation
Price-sensitive teams needing broad model access
avoid_when: Production LLM workloads (use specialized providers with better SLAs)
Need best-in-class for any single modality
summary: Novita AI is a budget-friendly unified AI inference platform covering LLMs (OpenAI-compatible), Stable Diffusion image generation, and video generation. Value proposition is breadth + low cost from a single API key. Not the best at any individual modality but convenient for multimodal prototyping. Python SDK available.
